provides 
that telehealth services are outside the scope of the Medicare home health benefit and 
home health PPS. 

This provision does not provide coverage or payment for Medicare home health services 
provided via a telecommunications system. The law does not permit the substitution or 
use of a telecommunications system to provide any covered home health services paid 
under the home health PPS, or any covered home health service paid outside of the home 
health PPS. As stated in 42 CFR
